get.summary:
protoc-gen-grpc-gateway-ts plugin is not support additional_bindings multiple methods (see: https://github.com/grpc-ecosystem/protoc-gen-grpc-gateway-ts/issues/32), but grpc-gateway support it.
so MUST use accrual http method in the mian request. additional_bindings just for compatibility.

branch.title: Git branch name, do not fill in the default main branch

commit.title: A commit of checkout is required, and no checkout is done without filling in

depth.title:
Clone depth. If not specified, clones all history. If set to 1, clones only the most recent commit
Clone only the most recent commit, can reduce clone time, cannot be used together with commit

endpoint.title: S3 access endpoint, can be domain name or IP

DataSourceOptionsSyncMode.title: Mode used when executing rclone, defaults to copy

DatasetStatusPhase.title:
- PENDING: Status just after creation
 - READY: Status that can be mounted
 - PROCESSING: Status being processed
 - FAILED: Status after processing failure, cannot be mounted

DeployTemplateInferenceRuntime.title:
- INFERENCE_RUNTIME_UNSPECIFIED: 未知
 - VLLM: vLLM
 - SGLANG: SGLang
 - IMAGE_GEN: 图像生成

gpuCores.title: 单个GPU算力核心百分比(cores percent)，取值范围 0-100

gpuCount.title: GPU 数量,单位个。当 gpu_type = vgpu 时，表示 vGPU 数量，一个GPU等于多个vGPU

ListModelRequestModelListSelector.title:
- ALL: 不添加筛选
 - HAS_DEPLOY_TEMPLATE: 只展示已经配置过部署模板的
 - NO_DEPLOY_TEMPLATE: 只展示未配置过部署模板的

cachedPerKTokens.title: 缓存命中时每 1k 个 token 的价格，单位元。

info.description: info contains the resolved image metadata, may be empty if no matching registry was found.

global.description: global indicates whether the image was found in a global registry.

public.description: public indicates whether the repository is publicly accessible.

tag.description: tag is the image tag or digest identifier.

distributedSupported.description:
Whether this runtime supports distributed mode. This is true when the
"distWorker" field for the runtime in runtime-templates.yaml is
non-empty in either the expansion ConfigMap or the default ConfigMap.

name.description: Runtime display name, e.g. { zhCn: "VLLM", enUs: "vllm" }.

runtimeCommand.description:
Single-node runtime command template. This is built from the
hydra-runtime-template-expansion ConfigMap if present, otherwise from
the default hydra-runtime-template ConfigMap. It corresponds to the
"single" field in runtime-templates.yaml plus any custom arguments.

v1alpha1JobStatus.description:
JobStatus represents the lifecycle state of a fine-tune job.
Defined here so it can be reused across multiple APIs.

 - UNKNOWN: The status of job is unknown.
 - PENDING: The status of job is pending.
 - RUNNING: The status of job is running.
 - COMPLETED: The status of job is completed.
 - FAILED: The status of job is failed.
 - DELETING: The status of job is deleting.

v1alpha1PlacementPolicy.description:
PlacementPolicy is the placement policy for model serving instances, which will be translated to TAS scheduling annotations.

 - BALANCED: Balanced placement, which tries to balance the instances across the cluster.
 - GROUPED: Grouped placement, which tries to group the instances together to improve communication performance.
